message.content: {"analysis":"Character n-gram training is extremely slow even with just 5 epochs. I've been waiting a long time with no output. I need to abort this and take a completely different approach. Let me use the fasttext CLI binary directly which might be more efficient, and skip character n-grams entirely.","plan":"1. Kill current training. 2. Download/use fasttext CLI binary. 3. Train with CLI which is more efficient. 4. Try larger dim=200 without char n-grams but with more epochs (25-50).","commands":[{"keystrokes":"C-c","duration":3.0}]}
